reviews.title: Unprofessional Staff and Absurd Charges
reviews.text:
had a deeply disappointing experience at this hotel. The staff were unprofessional, rude, and seemed to lack basic customer service skills. Instead of resolving issues amicably, they had the audacity to challenge me to leave a bad review — a truly baffling approach to guest relations.

The tipping point? They charged me for a missing teaspoon without even notifying me beforehand or providing evidence. A spoon. Something I wasn’t even aware was missing until I saw the charge.

This ridiculous incident, combined with the poor attitude of the staff, has ensured they’ve lost a customer permanently. Charging a guest for something so trivial without proper communication is unacceptable. 

Avoid this place if you value professionalism and respect.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: La cama es super cómoda, la habitación y baño limpio, tiene muy buena localización, el desayuno buffet es muy completo y variado. Si vuelvo a Con Dao. Repetiré.
reviews.negatives: Nada todo correcto.

reviews.title: over price bit far from center of town
reviews.text: one of the pricest hotel in condao. we paid for airport transfer,but there was no communication at all. food in Cafe need about 1 hour to prepare, even tho there are only 2 tables at the point of time. door have no sound proof, water pressure was low. hot water not constant.

reviews.title: J'ai été très déçu,
reviews.positives: Son emplacement. A part cela, rien ne me ferait revenir.
reviews.negatives: LA PROPRETÉ ! Tout est sale, de l'entrée, aux tables dans le jardin ou sur la cour extérieure du restaurant. La salle de bain a des vitres non nettoyées, les tables de chevet, le bureau principal : tout est empli de taches de verres et des dessous de tasses. Les vitres de la douche a de la crasse sur tout le pourtour. Les moquettes arrachées dans les couloirs, les ordures jamais ramassées dans les haies entourant l'établissement. Les cendriers pas nettoyés. La dame de l'accueil se cure le nez alors qu'elle est au comptoir. Dans l'ensemble, le désagréable sentiment d'une arnaque. Ce n'est pas un 4 étoiles.

reviews.title: Just normal, look like 3 star hotel
reviews.text: it is not valuable, room rate was too expensive for corner room without balcony, amenities  seams like as 3 star hotel, but the price was 5 star. swimming pool too small and uncomfortable. breakfast was good but simple,service staffs be quite good.
reviews.response:
Dear Manh,
Thank you very much for taking time to review our hotel. We apologize for any inconvenience this may have caused you. Your feedback is extremely valuable to us, as we strive to improve with each and every stay.
Best regards,
Marina Bay Con Dao hotel Team.

reviews.title: Agréable malgré quelques désagréments
reviews.positives: le personnel compétant et accueillant
reviews.negatives: nous avions réserve é chambre avec balcon , l'une avec un grand lit et l'autre avec lits jumeaux. Celle contenant des lits jumeaux ne possédait pas de balcon, d'ailleurs aucune avec lits jumeaux n'en a. Le débit internet était ridicule avec nombreuses coupures, le personnel de l'hôtel a installé une box wifi dans notre change pour que cela soit correct.

reviews.title: Hotel staff
reviews.text: The hotel is listed as a 4 stars hotel but very basic.  It is clean and comfortable.  The hotel staffs are very young and seem to be unenthusiastic about greeting and helping the guests.

reviews.title: Exceptional

reviews.negatives: Un léger sourire de la jeune fille à la réception au moins une fois pendant les 5 jours aurait été agréable.

reviews.title: TOO PRICY
reviews.text: The room rate is too high. Maybe because it's Con Dao.

reviews.title: es hat mit nicht gefallen. Nie wieder....

reviews.negatives: Frühstück war schlecht. Es war leer gefegt, wenn man etwas später zum Frühstück kommt. Für 4* Hotel kann man etwas anderes erwarten. Nie wieder

reviews.title: okay für 1-2 Tage. für längere Aufenthalte nicht zu empfehlen
reviews.positives: Allgemeiner optischer Eindruck war gut, Zimmer & Bad sauber, Betten nicht zu hart
reviews.negatives:
Es war wirklich sehr anstrengend, dass fast alle Mitarbeiter kein Wort englisch gesprochen haben. 
Leider ist der Pool sehr klein und es gibt dort keine Liegestühle. Sollte man einfach wissen. 
Das Frühstücksbuffet war leider gar nicht unser Fall. Es gab hauptsächlich warme, vietnamesische Gerichte.

reviews.title: area room and amenities
reviews.text: Room: too small area, balcony facing the sun and air conditioning not cool (very hot)
reviews.response:
Dear Anh Quang 
Dạ, Marinabay Hotel Côn Đảo chân thành cảm ơn anh/chị đã chia sẻ phản hồi quý báu 🙏

Rất tiếc khi kỳ nghỉ của anh/chị chưa thật sự thoải mái như mong đợi.
Chúng em xin ghi nhận góp ý về diện tích phòng, hướng ban công và điều hòa, và sẽ kiểm tra, khắc phục ngay để đảm bảo chất lượng tốt hơn cho những lần lưu trú sau.

Rất mong sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp và phục vụ anh/chị chu đáo hơn trong thời gian tới. 💙
Trân trọng cảm ơn anh/chị đã thông cảm và đồng hành cùng Marinabay Hotel Côn Đảo. 🌴
Trân trọng và cám ơn 
Mr Sang ( Felix Nguyen ) 
Sales Excutive Manager ( Hospitality in Viet Nam)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Alles, Frühstück fantastisch
reviews.negatives: War alle sehr sehr gut

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: The hotel is quite clean, and the breakfast food is delicious. However, I am very dissatisfied with the service: I booked a superior room - bay view, but when I checked in, I received a room with a view of residential houses. When I asked the front desk, I was told that "bay view means city view" and the hotel "supports upgrading to a larger room," even though I did not request this "support." The hotel changed the room category automatically without informing the guest. When I requested to arrange the correct view as per the booking, the hotel advised me to contact Agoda for an explanation. Additionally, I booked for 2 nights, but I couldn't check in on the first night due to a flight cancellation and had informed the hotel to check in early the next morning. I was only served as if I had stayed for one night, as the hotel did not provide extra water nor cleaned the room the next day.

reviews.negatives: Khách sạn 4* nhưng nội thất ko bằng Khách sạn The Mystery Côn Đảo, bụi rất nhiều trên mặt bàn và đồ dùng. Ks 4* mà nền gạch kém quá, book phòng đơn mà khi đến nhận phòng Ks lại đưa vô phòng có cửa thông với phòng kế bên, tối đến cứ gõ cửa ko ngủ được, Ks nên sắp sếp những phòng như vậy cho gia đình ở gần nhau thì phù hợp. Bạn quản lý nên tư vấn khách khi đến nhận phòng, mình đặt booking ko biết 2 phòng thông nhau.

reviews.title: Marina Bay was just ok
reviews.text:
We stayed three nights.  The location is good; the property is relatively clean and the staff was nice.   The room was nice.  

Negatives- Breakfast buffet is mediocre at best.  If you are a foreigner, it falls short.
The pool is useless.  Small, no place to lay around.  Didn’t even use it.
Loud parties in a conference room by the lobby for two of the three nights.  The noise was quite loud even on our 4th floor room.
Wifi in our room was pretty much useless.
If I said this was a 3 * hotel, I’m being generous.   It wasn’t cheap, so, not good value for money.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for taking the time to share your detailed feedback following your stay at Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel.

We truly appreciate your kind comments regarding our location, cleanliness, room quality, and the friendliness of our staff. It is encouraging to know that these aspects met your expectations.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you experienced. We regret that the breakfast buffet did not meet your preferences, especially as an international guest. Your feedback is very valuable, and we will work on improving the variety and quality to better suit different tastes.

Regarding the pool area, noise from events, and Wi-Fi connection, we fully understand your concerns. We are reviewing these issues with the relevant teams to enhance guest comfort, including better sound control during events and improving internet stability throughout the hotel.

We are truly sorry that your overall experience did not reflect the value you expected

reviews.title: Nice hotel to stay
reviews.text: With good location and close to the beach. Good breakfast &  nice taste, however it was not well Prepared on the first day, beef stew…Nice staff and  service 2 ways transportation from hotel to airport.
reviews.response:
Thank you sincerely for taking the time to share your experience with us. We’re delighted to know that you enjoyed our prime location near the beach, the breakfast selection, and the convenience of our two-way airport transfer. Your kind words about our staff truly mean a lot to us.

We’re sorry to hear that the breakfast on your first day, especially the beef stew, was not prepared to the standard we aim for. Your feedback is extremely valuable, and we have already shared it with our culinary team to ensure immediate improvement.

We truly appreciate your trust in choosing to stay with us. It would be our pleasure to welcome you back soon for a more perfect and memorable stay.

Nguyễn Sang ( Felix Nguyen )
Team Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel

reviews.title: Nice hotel at central location
reviews.text: Solo traveler here. Hotel is right in the middle of town so it's easy access to shops and restaurants, and beaches. Check in was easy. My room has a problem with ants, lots of them. And hot water was not hot, just warm enough, and sometimes there's little water coming out. Overall it was a good stay.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for choosing to stay with us and for taking the time to share your feedback. We are delighted to know that you enjoyed our convenient location and smooth check-in process.

We sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you experienced with the ants in your room as well as the water temperature and pressure. Please be assured that we have addressed these issues with our housekeeping and maintenance teams to ensure improvements are made promptly.

Your comments are truly valuable to us, and we appreciate your understanding. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with an even better experience on your next visit.

Warm regards,
Nguyen Sang
Guest Relations Team

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Địa điểm ngay trung tâm, phòng ốc tiện nghi, hiện đại. Xứng đáng với giá phòng. Mình còn được đưa đón sân bay miễn phí nữa!

reviews.title: Great location and staff
reviews.text:
The staff were friendly and helpful, but seem generally overworked, mostly because we observed some very demanding guests over the weekend while we stayed at the hotel. Because of the nature of the guests coming from a certain part of Vietnam that tend to be a lot louder and a lot less civilized with service people, I could empathize a lot with the staff. Given the many challenges that the staff must face from many of the guests that we observed, I would say that the staff are stellar.

To be very frank, everything about the hotel was either great or acceptable and it was the behavior and loudness of other guests that made our stay in any way unpleasant.

The rooms are spacious enough and generally clean, but we had a half used bottle of lotion in the bathroom at check-in and one of the bottles of water was already opened. Because of the hard water on the island, the showerhead spray was a little bit erratic. Other than that, the beds are comfortable, the room is VERY well lit and has good lighting which is hard to find in most mid-tier hotels in Vietnam.

The breakfast options are more traditional Vietnamese than western, but most of the food was rather nice for a hotel breakfast. There is a public beach and the passenger ferry port are very close by. As Northern people have not focused on the island as a beach holiday destination yet, they have not ruined the natural environment with rubbish and litter as they have on Phu Quoc and other beach resorts on the Vietnamese mainland.

The hotel has a small outdoor pool but the platform and stairs up to it are very slippery, so they should take better measures to make it safer.

The location of the hotel is the biggest draw. It is close to the beach and rather central on the island on the western edge of the town if you are keen to explore the north and west coast of the island or if you are interested in all of the museums and historical sights in town.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Các bạn ở quầy lễ tân

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is clean and the staff is very enthusiastic. However, the soundproofing is a bit poor, and there is no hot water for bathing; it is very slow due to being on the 7th floor. The breakfast is diverse and easy to eat. Additionally, the hotel serves lunch and dinner, with 4 combo options for 2 people at 420k per combo. The food is very delicious and clean, and the price of 420k for 2 people is very reasonable. The hotel offers free round-trip airport transportation. You just need to notify them in advance and they will arrange for someone to pick you up at the airport.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: God lokasjon,  nære restauranter og en fantastisk steand. Stort rom, alt fungerte og en stor og god buffet frokost. Kan anbefale swimming poolen i 7.etg.
reviews.negatives: Har ingen negative kommentarer

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good location

reviews.title: Wygodny hotel
reviews.positives: Hotel jest świetny, bardzo wygodny pokój oraz świetna lokalizacja i wspaniała obsługa czynią go jednym z lepszych na wyspie.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: excellent hotel

reviews.title: dobrá volba
reviews.positives: hotel je na klidném konci městečka, nicméně blízko do centra. má dostatek parkovacích míst na umístění pronajatých skůtrů. spalo se zde dobře. měli jsme i celkem hezký výhled. náš pokoj měl střízlívý design, působil klidně. snídaně byla fajn. nechybělo ani tradiční Pho a výběr několika dalších pokrmů (lokální kuchyně), bazén na střeše také celkem fajn, byť postrádal prostor k posezení či opalování.
reviews.negatives: kovové předměty v koupelně (například odpakový koš) jsou pokryté korozí. zaslouží si buďto vyměnit, nebo vyleštit. takto zbytečně kazí dojem jinak hezkého pokoje.

reviews.title: Solid Hotel, reasonable for money
reviews.text: The hotel is nice enough, however, the top floor (7th) has walls that are somewhat slanted and we hit our heads often.  In addition, the wall between the bathroom and bedroom was bulging with water damage from the shower.  The shower didn't work that well.  It looked nice, but the pressure didn't transfer to the shower heads well.  It felt like a hotel built with minimal oversight of construction, thus will likely have many problems in the future as it ages.  On the whole, a good experience, nice people, and a solid effort.
reviews.response:
Thank you very much for taking the time to share your detailed feedback and for choosing Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel.

We are pleased to know that overall you had a good experience and found our team friendly and welcoming. Your kind words about the effort of our staff truly mean a lot to us.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the inconveniences you experienced, particularly regarding the slanted walls on the 7th floor, the condition of the bathroom wall, and the shower pressure. Please rest assured that your comments have been shared with our management and maintenance teams for immediate inspection and improvement. Guest comfort and safety are always our top priorities, and your feedback helps us identify areas where we need to do better.

We truly appreciate your honest observations and your understanding. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back in the future and provide you with an even more comfortable and improved stay at Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel.

Warm regard

reviews.title: The money we paid is not valued
reviews.positives: Breakfast is very bad  soup is cold and not hygiene.staff’s attitude is very bad. No hot water for showers
reviews.negatives: Staff’s attitude. Breakfast is so bad : soup noodles are cold and all food areas are hygiene

A nice place to stay, staffs are very friendly. It's very convenient to move around from this place to all spots. Easy to hire a scooter or electric car to move around the island.
Hotel has a private transfer car to pick us at the airport and back. 
The lounge is clean. Rooms are also. We have nice time here

Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for your kind words and for sharing your positive experience at Marina Bay Hotel Con Dao. We’re delighted to know that you enjoyed our convenient location, clean facilities, and especially our friendly staff and airport transfer service.

It’s wonderful to hear that you had a pleasant stay and a great time exploring the island. We truly appreciate your feedback and look forward to welcoming you back for another relaxing visit soon!

Warm regards,
Mr Sang ( Felix Nguyen ) - Sales Excutive Manager 
Marina Bay Hotel Con Dao

reviews.title: Exceeds Expectations
reviews.text:
Very nice find.  A true hidden gem.  The corner room we booked had glass walls on 2 side…ocean view and Mountain View.  Nice modern styling, cold AC,  good breakfast , friendly staff.  

We’ve been coming to Con Dao from 10 years, we normally stay at a beach front cottage down the road, but got ravaged by sand flea’s last time.  This is a perfect alternative.  On the 6th floor laying in bed watching the sky and rain over the mountains.  We will be staying here again.

reviews.title: Central
reviews.text: This hotel is accessable to visiting places. Comfortable!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Great hotel in this price range. Friendly and enthusiastic staff, with a breakfast buffet with many dishes. Located right in the center. Luxurious, comfortable, and spacious rooms.

reviews.title: Perfect!!! Nothing to complain
reviews.text: At first I was a little skeptical about the hotel due to the rating at booking.com. However, reading through reviews here made me decide to stay. And turned out to be a perfect decision. The hotel was amazing, large and clean room, pickup dropoff free, staff super friendly, they let us check in early too. The swimming pool and gym at 7th floor is nice, great view of the sea. Definitely stay here for next trip!!!!!

reviews.title: Indeed, just as I expected.
reviews.text: It's been a while since I returned to Con Dao, so I was quite hesitant when choosing a hotel. When I opened the Agoda App, I was immediately impressed by the clean and airy images of Marina Bay hotel. It really is like that. Not only that, the hotel is also very attentive in its airport transfer service. Thank you, Marina Bay. Thank you, Agoda. I will come back next time.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Beautiful and Clean Hotel.

reviews.title: worth experiencing
reviews.text: The hotel is close to the train station, clean and beautiful, with friendly and cheerful staff. The breakfast, although not diverse, is delicious. I will definitely come back next time.

reviews.title: Wonderful relaxation
reviews.text: The hotel is clean. Convenient location.

reviews.title: Amazing
reviews.text: Good vibe in here

reviews.title: Good hotel
reviews.text: Good service, enthusiastic and gentle staff, decent breakfast, clean room.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: I booked a room for my friend, and when I called the hotel for assistance, a very enthusiastic male receptionist helped me, unfortunately, I forgot his name. On the day my friend checked in, there was also a female staff member who assisted with airport transportation, everything was wonderful.

reviews.title: Worth the money
reviews.text:
Compared to the last time, this return to the hotel has seen significant improvements:  
- The staff is friendly, enthusiastic, and supportive in helping guests check in early.  
- The breakfast is much better than last time.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel has all the necessary services, friendly staff, and clean rooms that are cleaned daily. I felt very comfortable staying at Marina Bay ❤️

reviews.title: A worthwhile accommodation in Con Dao.
reviews.text: The 4-star hotel is fully equipped, with clean and spacious rooms, attentive and dedicated staff, and offers airport shuttle services. Considering the external service charges, you can save about 500,000 VND.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Good location, good hotel, good view

reviews.title: Great experience at Marina Bay Con Dao
reviews.text: The room is clean, and the staff are friendly and supportive.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Wonderful hotel, excellent location, creating a relaxing and peaceful feeling. Friendly and enthusiastic staff. Fully equipped and easily accessible facilities. Rooms are cleaned daily. Beautiful scenery, providing great experiences. Staying here is a fantastic choice for every traveler.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean. The staff and receptionists are very friendly and eager to help. I will come back if I have the chance!

reviews.title: Good base
reviews.text: very pleasant stay. Convenient location, friendly staff, good breakfast and very comfortable room. We will stay again and happy to recommend to others :)

reviews.title: Very good location and excellent service
reviews.text: Great location values for money. We will come back here soon . Staff vey hospitality. Highly recommended. Thank you .

reviews.title: Friendly and helpful staff
reviews.text: We really enjoyed staying here. Would strongly recommend this hotel to other.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Friendly staffs, clean room and nice services.

reviews.title: Increíble estadía! :)
reviews.text: Hotel super cómodo, muy bien ubicado! Desayuno completo! Mega recomendable si vienes a Con Dao
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for your wonderful review and for choosing Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel.

We are delighted to hear that you found our hotel comfortable, well located, and enjoyed our complete breakfast. Your kind recommendation truly means a lot to our team.

We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back on your next visit to Côn Đảo. 🌊

Warm regards,
Nguyen Sang ( Felix Nguyen)
Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel

reviews.title: Bon hôtel
reviews.text: Pour un hôtel 4*, un peu déçus quand même par les prestations de service. La plupart du personnel parle très peu anglais, voire pas du tout.  Le service laundry est excessivement cher ! Sinon la chambre est spacieuse et conforme à la description.  La piscine sur le roof top et la plage à proximité sont très appréciables, ainsi que la location des scooters.
reviews.response:
Dear [Guest’s Name],

Thank you very much for taking the time to share your feedback with Marinabay Hotel Con Dao. 🌴

We sincerely regret that some aspects of your stay did not fully meet your expectations, particularly regarding communication in English and laundry pricing. Your comments are very valuable to us — we will review and make improvements to ensure better service quality in the future.

We are, however, delighted to know that you enjoyed the spacious room, the rooftop pool, the nearby beach, and our motorbike rental service.

Your feedback helps us grow and provide a more satisfying experience for all our guests.
We truly hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and offer a more pleasant stay next time. 💙

Warm regards,
Felix Nguyen ( Mr Sang )
Sales Excutive Manager ( Hospitality in Viet Nam)

reviews.title: everything ok
reviews.text: everything ok

reviews.title: Amazing staying at the Marina Bay Hotel
reviews.text:
How wonderful it was to choose the Marina Bay Hotel for my trip to Con Dao. I loved it. Perfekt location. 
The very kind staff made my stay truly enjoyable. I have only one word to describe the room I booked: fantastic. I really hope to stay at the Marina Bay Hotel again.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for your beautiful and heartfelt review. We are truly delighted that you chose Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel for your trip and that your experience with us was so memorable.

It brings us great joy to know that you loved our location, appreciated the kindness of our team, and found your room “fantastic.” Your kind words mean more to us than we can express and are a wonderful motivation for our entire staff.

We sincerely look forward to welcoming you back to Marina Bay Côn Đảo for another fantastic stay in the near future.

Warmest regards,
Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel
Felix Nguyen ( Mr Sang)

reviews.title: 最低なホテル
reviews.text:
空港から無料送迎を頼んだら、英語もロクに話せない女性スタッフが、色々な情報を聞いてきた上で、こちらの電話を何度も勝手に切って、最後には「車はないからタクシーで来るように」と言ってきた。その女性スタッフに翌日の空港への送迎を頼んだが「車はない」という。しかしホテルにはどう見ても送迎用の車が停まっている。変なので別の男性スタッフに相談したところ普通に無料送迎使えるし英語も上手だったし親切だった。翌朝には部屋のトイレの水が突然に噴き出して水浸しになるトラブルがありフロントに急いで対処を依頼したが、やはりこの女性スタッフが担当であったが「急いで」と伝えたのに全く対処せずに、結局もう一度電話して別のスタッフが対応してやっと処置してくれた。

とてもじゃないが設備もサービスも4つ星ホテルのサービスではない。値段も高いのに極めて不快な気分になった。二度と利用することはないし、絶対に泊まるなと言いたい。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: 良かった
reviews.response:
Thank you so much! 🌸
We’re so happy to know that you had a great experience at Marinabay Hotel Con Dao 💙
We truly look forward to welcoming you back for your next stay! 🌴

Warm regards,
Felix Nguyen ( Mr . Sang)
Marinabay Hotel Con Dao

reviews.title: ロケーション最高の4つ星ホテル
reviews.text: 近くに多くのレストランがあり便利です。

reviews.title: 가격대비 좋아요.
reviews.text: 조식을 중요하게 생각하시는 분들에게는 비추함.  대신 주변 어디를 가든 걸어서 20분 내외라 위치는 좋음.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for sharing your feedback and for choosing Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel.

We are pleased to know that you appreciated our convenient location, with many attractions within walking distance.

At the same time, we sincerely apologize that our breakfast did not meet your expectations. Your comment is very important to us, and we will work on improving the variety and quality to better serve all our guests.

Thank you again for your valuable feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and provide you with a better experience in the future.

Warm regards,
Nguyen Sang ( Felix Nguyen)
Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel

reviews.title: Nhân viên ứng xử khá tệ
reviews.text:
Khách sạn 4* mà không cho mượn bàn ủi :)) 
Nhân viên không nhiệt tình 
Sẽ không quay lại khách sạn này nữa

reviews.title: Tiện nghi kém
reviews.text:
Khách sạn rất đắt so với các khách sạn xung quanh nhưng tiện nghi rất kém. 
Nóng lạnh chập chờn, điều hòa cũng chập chờn
Không đủ đội ngũ nhân viên tiếp tân, khách thường phải tự mở cửa khi đi vào

reviews.title: Phòng quá nhỏ và khách sạn với dịch vụ ăn sáng nghèo nàn
reviews.text:
1- Phòng nhỏ so với mức giá
2- Không đón khách ở sân bay. 
3- Dịch vụ bữa sáng nghèo nàn.
reviews.response:
Kính chào quý khách,
Lời đầu tiên, khách sạn Marina Bay Côn Đảo xin cám ơn quý khách hàng đã dành thời gian đóng góp ý kiến về những trải nghiệm dịch vụ của quý khách.
Với tiêu chí cung cấp cho khách hàng những dịch vụ tốt nhất và đặt sự hài lòng của khách hàng lên hàng đầu, đội ngũ Marina Bay luôn cố gắng hết mình để ngày càng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ cũng như cơ sở vật chất của khách sạn. Do đó góp ý của quý khách là rất có giá trị để khách sạn có thể hoàn thiện hệ thống của mình.
Về vấn đề đón khách tại sân bay, quý khách cần thông báo muộn nhất 24 giờ trước ngày nhận phòng để được hỗ trợ dịch vụ. Chúng tôi rất lấy làm tiếc vì thông tin này chưa đến được với quý khách.
Hy vọng sẽ được đón tiếp quý khách vào những dịp sau khi quý khách du lịch đến Côn Đảo.
Chúc quý khách và gia đình thật nhiều sức khỏe.
Trân trọng.

reviews.title: Marinabay Côn Đảo
reviews.text: Phòng có view đẹp, khu vực trung tâm dễ đi lại. Nv chưa chuyên nghiệp lắm với quy mô khách sạn. Đồ ăn buffet rất ít để lựa chọn, khẩu vị vừa đủ k ngon cũng không dở. Quá ít nv để đáp ứng nhu cầu của khách. Cần vật dụng gì phải xuống lễ tân xin chứ không có người mang lên phòng giúp.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text:
Đặt giường to cho phòng 2 giường nhỏ
Nhờ ks đổi thì bảo liên hệ với bên booking

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Khi đến sân bay có xe đưa đón mà không thấy gọi điện để đón làm cho tôi không biết phải thuê xe.
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn anh/chị đã chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình tại Marina Bay Hotel Côn Đảo.
Chúng tôi rất xin lỗi vì sự bất tiện trong việc đón sân bay. Đội ngũ khách sạn luôn cố gắng liên hệ và sắp xếp xe đưa đón đúng giờ theo thông tin chuyến bay mà khách hàng cung cấp. Rất tiếc nếu trong trường hợp này đã có sự hiểu nhầm hoặc thiếu thông tin khiến anh/chị phải tự di chuyển.

Chúng tôi sẽ rà soát lại quy trình để tránh xảy ra sự cố tương tự, và rất mong có cơ hội được đón tiếp anh/chị lần nữa để phục vụ chu đáo hơn.

Trân trọng,
Mr Sang ( Felix Nguyen )
Marina Bay Hotel Côn Đảo

reviews.title: Khách sạn mới trung tâm
reviews.text: Khách sạn ở vị trí trung tâm. Mới nên sạch sẽ, tiện nghi không nhiều. Chất lượng tốt tuy nhiên giá thành còn hơi cao. Một sự lựa chọn tốt khi đến côn đảo. Phòng đầy đủ tuy nhiên hơi nhỏ

reviews.title: Phòng cách âm kém
reviews.text: Phòng cách âm quá kém, ồn, cả đêm bị mất ngủ vì khách phòng bên cạnh thức chơi bài.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Khách sạn ổn nhân viên nhiệt tình
reviews.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ đánh giá về kỳ nghỉ tại Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết Quý khách hài lòng với khách sạn và sự nhiệt tình của đội ngũ nhân viên. Những lời động viên của Quý khách là nguồn khích lệ lớn để chúng tôi tiếp tục nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ mỗi ngày.

Rất mong được chào đón Quý khách quay trở lại trong thời gian tới. 🌿

Trân trọng,
Mr Sang ( Felix Nguyen )
Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel

reviews.title: Thuận tiện
reviews.text: Có dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay trong giá phòng tốt, gần các điểm tham quan.
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn anh/chị đã dành thời gian chia sẻ cảm nhận. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay và vị trí thuận tiện gần các điểm tham quan đã mang đến trải nghiệm tốt cho anh/chị.

Rất mong được tiếp tục chào đón anh/chị quay lại Marina Bay Côn Đảo trong thời gian tới! 🌿✨

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Dịch vụ tốt

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Khách sạn sạch sẽ, ăn uống ngon

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Ok

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text: Khách sạn sạch sẽ, tiện nghi, nhân viên nhiệt tình, lịch sự  chỉ là đồ ăn sáng sơ sài, ít món có thể do mình đi ko phải mùa cao điểm nên ít khách. Hy vọng là cải thiện về bữa sáng thì ok

reviews.title: Còn nhiều điểm cần thay đổi
reviews.text:
Ưu điểm: Vị trí ngay trung tâm, gần cầu cảng đang xây, một trong khách sạn có tầng cao có thể ngắm biển. Nhân viên thân thiện. Ăn sáng ổn so với vị trí trên đảo.
Nhược điểm: cách âm rất kém, nghe rõ phòng bên cạnh và tiếng nước wc từ tầng trên. Không hợp với người khó ngủ. Bể bơi không nên tính vì rộng mấy m2, đóng cửa sửa chữa cùng quán bar. Dịch vụ khách sạn không có gì.

reviews.title: Cần cải tiến để xứng đáng với giá tiêgn
reviews.text:
Nhân viên nhiệt tình (Nam, nhà ăn, lái xe)
Charge 200k tiền giặt ủi vết bẩn nhỏ do lỡ làm đổ nước ngọt (rất máy móc)
Phòng cách âm kém

reviews.title: Khách sạn thân thiện và văn minh.
reviews.text: Nhân viên phục vụ rất chu đáo và tận tình.
reviews.response:
Cảm ơn anh/chị rất nhiều vì lời khen dành cho đội ngũ nhân viên của chúng tôi.
Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng anh/chị hài lòng với sự phục vụ chu đáo và tận tình tại Marina Bay Hotel Côn Đảo.
Hy vọng sẽ được chào đón anh/chị quay lại trong kỳ nghỉ sắp tới!

Trân trọng,
Mr. Sang (Felix Nguyen)
Sales Executive Manager
Marina Bay Hotel Côn Đảo

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Tất cả đều tốt chỉ có tài xế đón khách và đưa rước khách vẻ mặt khó nhìn , coi thường khách . Làm dịch vụ nên xem lại thái độ .

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Marina Bay sạch, đẹp, ăn ngon, view thoáng.

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.text: Giá  tiền trung nên phù hợp !

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.text: Tôi sẽ quay lại lần sau vì nơi nghỉ đẹp, sạch sẽ, yên tĩnh

reviews.title: khách sạn đẹp. view đẹp
reviews.text: sẽ trở lại lần sau, nhân viên thân thiện, xe tốt trung chuyển khách ra bến tàu và sân bay đúng giờ.Khách sạn sạch sẽ.
reviews.response:
Chào Quý khách,

Cảm ơn bạn rất nhiều vì đã lựa chọn Marina Bay Côn Đảo.
Chúng tôi rất vui khi được phục vụ tốt cho bạn.
Mong được cung cấp cho bạn một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ khác trong tương lai gần.
Cảm ơn bạn.

Trân trọng
Marina Bay Team.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: tiên đi lại, có xe đưa đón sân bay
reviews.response:
Dear Mr./Ms. Nguyen,

Thank you very much for your excellent rating and for choosing Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel.

We are delighted to hear that you found our location convenient and appreciated our airport transfer service. Your satisfaction is a great motivation for our team to continue delivering the best experience to our guests.

We truly look forward to welcoming you and your group back in the near future. 🌊

Warm regards,
Nguyễn Sang ( Felix Nguyễn)
Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel
reviews.room_type: Deluxe City View Twin Room with WiFi, Shower and Safe - Non-Smoking

reviews.text: Khách sanh trung tâm, sạch sẽ, đẹp, nhân viên chu đáo, nhiệt tinh

reviews.title: Du lịch tâm linh
reviews.text: Khách sạn ngay trung tâm thành phố, thuận tiện cho việc đi dạo buổi tối và ăn uống, có nhà hàng và các quán ăn bình dân... ăn sáng bình thường.

reviews.title: Du lịch tâm linh
reviews.text: Khách sạn ngay trung tâm, thuận tiện ăn uống đi dạo về đêm, gần bãi biển... ăn sáng bình thường, nhân viên bình thường.

reviews.title: Giá cả hợp lý
reviews.text: Phòng nhỏ, ko có gì đặc biệt, phù hợp với giá. Điểm cộng cho dịch vụ linh hoạt, chu đáo, nhân viên nhiệt tình. Bạn sẽ được đưa đón sân bay miễn phí theo chuyến bay của bạn nên nhớ liên hệ với khách sạn trước khi đến.

reviews.title: Khách sạn đẹp, csvc tốt nhưng ko gần biển
reviews.text:
Ks đẹp. Tôi đặt deluxe nhưng được nâng cấp lên Royal Suite free vì ks báo Deluxe có vấn đề. 
Buffet sáng khá nghèo nàn.
Ks ko có vị trí đắc địa đối diện biển. Nên thêm tiện ích thuê xe đạp cho khách miễn phí.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: khách sạn mọi thứ đèu ổn
reviews.response:
Dạ, Marinabay Hotel Côn Đảo xin cảm ơn anh/chị đã tin tưởng và dành lời khen cho khách sạn 💙
Rất vui khi anh/chị cảm thấy hài lòng với kỳ nghỉ tại đây.
Hy vọng sẽ sớm được đón tiếp anh/chị quay lại trong những chuyến đi tới Côn Đảo! 🌴
Trân trọng và cám ơn 
Mr Sang ( Felix Nguyen ) 
Sales Excutive Manager ( Hospitality in Viet Nam)

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Dịch vụ chu đáo, nhiệt tình, phòng sạch đủ tiện nghi. 
Cách âm chưa tốt nghe người phòng khác nói chuyện,
reviews.response:
Kính gửi chị Hang,

Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel xin chân thành cảm ơn chị đã lựa chọn lưu trú và dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết chị hài lòng với sự chu đáo, nhiệt tình của đội ngũ nhân viên cũng như sự sạch sẽ và tiện nghi của phòng nghỉ. Đồng thời, chúng tôi cũng chân thành ghi nhận góp ý của chị về vấn đề cách âm chưa được tốt. Đây là ý kiến rất quý giá để khách sạn tiếp tục cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ và mang đến trải nghiệm thoải mái hơn cho khách hàng trong tương lai.

Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón chị quay trở lại Marina Bay Côn Đảo trong những chuyến đi sắp tới.

Trân trọng,
Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: Khách sạn rộng, sạch sẽ, gần bến tàu đi tour đảo. Rất ổn áp, nhân viên thân thiện.
reviews.response:
Kính gửi chị Thi,

Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel xin chân thành cảm ơn chị đã lựa chọn lưu trú và dành thời gian chia sẻ những cảm nhận tuyệt vời về khách sạn.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết chị hài lòng với không gian rộng rãi, sạch sẽ, vị trí thuận tiện gần bến tàu đi tour đảo cũng như sự thân thiện của đội ngũ nhân viên. Những lời khen của chị chính là động lực để chúng tôi tiếp tục nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ mỗi ngày.

Hy vọng sẽ sớm được chào đón chị và gia đình quay trở lại Marina Bay Côn Đảo trong những chuyến đi sắp tới.

Trân trọng,
Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel

reviews.title: Sentralt.
reviews.text: Kan anbefales. Reine rom god service. Litt begrenset utvalg til frokost. Lite basseng og ingen solsenger. Var vist til reparasjon men dette har gjester fått beskjed om i meget lang tid etter å ha lest tilbakemeldinger. Så viljen er nok ikke tilstede for å endre på noe.
reviews.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you for your feedback and for recommending Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel.

We are pleased to know that you appreciated our clean rooms and good service. At the same time, we sincerely apologize for the limitations you experienced with the breakfast selection and the pool area.

Regarding the pool and sun loungers, we truly regret that the situation did not meet your expectations. Your comment is very important to us, and we understand your concern. Please be assured that we are reviewing this matter seriously to improve our facilities and provide a better experience for our guests.

Thank you once again for your honest feedback. We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back and offer you a more satisfying stay in the future.

Warm regards,
Nguyen Sang ( Felix Nguyen)
Marina Bay Côn Đảo Hotel

reviews.title: OK men dyrt
reviews.text:
Vi bodde här 3 nätter. Första natten vaknade vi av att ACn krånglade och lät så mycket att vi vaknade, fick gå ner till receptionen 05:30. De skickade en tekniker ca 2 h senare. De löste inte problemet och vi fick byta rum. Tyvärr funkade inte ACn alls där och vi vaknade varje morgon genomsvettiga. Vid ett tillfälle såg vi en kackerlacka i badrummet som försvann ner i golvbrunnen. 

Frukosten var okej, ingen variation tyvärr och lite utbud, men förståligt då det var väldigt lite gäster. 

Personalen var trevliga och hjälpsamma under tiden vi var incheckade. Efter vi checkat ut och kom på att vi inte sagt till att ACn i nya rummet krånglat, (vi ville säga till så de kunde lösa problemet innan någon annan gäst tog in i samma rum) så blev vi nästan bortfösta från hotellet då managern inte ville riskera att gäster som höll på att checka in skulle höra. Tråkigt att bli bemött så när vi ville hjälpa dem undvika fler missöden. 

Poolen på taket var fin, men iskall och det fanns inga dynor till solstolarna som var i trä. 

Dyrt rum för vad man fick. 

Inget som hotellet kan rå för, men vi blev väckta till och från hela nätterna av tuppar som gal på andra sidan gatan, inte särskilt ljudisolerat rum dvs.

reviews.title: Reviret of Marina Bay
reviews.text:
The rooms are very airy and nice.  Outstanding bathroom with big shower. 
Just a few English speaking staff but the ones that speak English are very helpful.  
As Europeans, in the breakfast we missed black tea. It was very much focus on Vietnamese food but the staff explained that they have almost only Vietnamese guests.
Nice pool on the roof, rather small but with a beautiful view.

reviews.title: Skvělý hotel
reviews.text: Personál na recepci umí anglicky, výborné snídaně, měkká pohodlná postel, velká koupelna (jen trvá delší dobu, než začne téct teplá voda), bazén na terase s krásným výhledem.
reviews.response:
Dear Lucie,
Thank you for choosing to stay in Marina Bay Con Dao Hotel.
Your comments is highly appreciated.
It was our pleasure to have served you well.
Looking forward to offering you yet another memorable stay in the very near future.
Thank You.
